source.section: 5.3 - HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display) Symbology > 5.3.1 - HMD Symbology > E - Air-to-Ground Symbology

steps.action: Press the A/G Master Mode Button

Press Sensor Control Switch FWD to toggle the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) priority between the HUD (Heads-Up Display) and the HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display). TDC priority is assigned to the helmet when the aiming reticle appears on the helmet.
Designation can be performed with TDC controls (see sub-section
